message:
feat(mail): restore full inbox implementation and fix dashboard references

This commit restores the full mail inbox implementation and fixes
remaining package reference issues in the dashboard.

Mail Inbox Restoration (mail.go):
- Restore full newMailInboxCmd() implementation
- Restore mailInboxClient interface
- Restore runMailInbox() function with all supporting code
- Restore aggregatedMessage struct
- Add back imports: filepath, sort, sync
- Full inbox aggregation across project agents
- Support for --agent, --urgent, --session-agents, --limit, --json flags

Mail Inbox Placeholder (mail_inbox.go):
- Clear placeholder file (implementation now in mail.go)

Dashboard Fixes (dashboard.go, layout.go):
- Fix package reference consistency
- Add missing import

This consolidates the mail inbox functionality into mail.go for simpler
maintenance while keeping the placeholder file for future modularization.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
